zh.lifeSummary: Cecilie Jonsdatter (Litle Galen)是Jon Jonsen Litle Galen和Ingefred Torbernsdotter的女兒，於1252年出生。她於1298年與Peder Vaedder Absalonsen Ulfeldt在丹麥尼波格斯騰斯特盧普結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1307年12月29日在丹麥福雷德利可斯波格霍爾波艾斯波德盧普艾斯波德盧普享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Cecilie Jonsdatter (Litle Galen)是Jon Jonsen Litle Galen和Ingefred Torbernsdotter的女儿，于1252年出生。她于1298年与Peder Vaedder Absalonsen Ulfeldt在丹麦尼波格斯騰斯特盧普结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1307年12月29日在丹麦福雷德利可斯波格霍爾波艾斯波德盧普艾斯波德盧普享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: (Litle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Little  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

variants.name: Little
meanings: English: nickname for a small man (if not ironic), or distinguishing epithet for the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, from Middle English littel, Old English lȳtel (see Light 3).
Irish: translation into English of Gaelic Ó Beagáin ‘descendant of Beagán’ (see Began ).
Americanized form (translation into English) of any of various European surnames meaning ‘little’, e.g. French Petit , Polish Mały (see Maly 1).

nameMeanings.name: Galen)
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch (Van Galen): habitational name, probably from the German town of Gahlen in North Rhine-Westphalia, or perhaps from the village Gaal in the province of North Brabant.
English (Cambridgeshire and Essex): variant of   Galyon   or   Gallon  .

variants.name: Galyon
meanings: English: variant of   Gallion  . This form of the surname has died out in Britain. Compare   Galyan   and   Galyen  .

nameMeanings.name: Cecilie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

en.lifeSummary: Cecilie Jonsdatter (Litle Galen) was born in 1252 as the daughter of Jon Jonsen Litle Galen and Ingefred Torbernsdotter. She married Peder Vaedder Absalonsen Ulfeldt in 1298, in Stenstrup, Nyborg, Denmark. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 29 December 1307, in Esbønderup, Esbønderup, Holbo, Frederiksborg, Denmark, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Cecilie Jonsdatter (Litle Galen) est née en 1252, fille de Jon Jonsen Litle Galen et Ingefred Torbernsdotter. Elle a épousé Peder Vaedder Absalonsen Ulfeldt en 1298, à Stenstrup, Nyborg, Danemark. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 29 décembre 1307, à Esbønderup, Esbønderup, Holbo, Frederiksborg, Danemark, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Cecilie Jonsdatter (Litle Galen) wurde 1252, als Tochter von Jon Jonsen Litle Galen und Ingefred Torbernsdotter geboren. Sie hat 1298 in Stenstrup, Nyborg, Dänemark Peder Vaedder Absalonsen Ulfeldt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 29. Dezember 1307 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Esbønderup, Esbønderup, Holbo, Frederiksborg, Dänemark.

it.lifeSummary: Cecilie Jonsdatter (Litle Galen) è nata il nel 1252 come figlia di Jon Jonsen Litle Galen e Ingefred Torbernsdotter. Lei sposato Peder Vaedder Absalonsen Ulfeldt nel 1298, nel Stenstrup, Nyborg, Danimarca. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 29 dicembre 1307, nel Esbønderup, Esbønderup, Holbo, Frederiksborg, Danimarca, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecilie Jonsdatter (Litle Galen)は1252年にJon Jonsen Litle GalenとIngefred Torbernsdotterの娘として生まれた。1298年にデンマークニーボルグステンストルップでPeder Vaedder Absalonsen Ulfeldtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1307年12月29日にデンマークフレデリクスボルグホールボエスブoンデルップエスブoンデルップで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecilie Jonsdatter (Litle Galen)(은)는 1252년 Jon Jonsen Litle Galen(와)과 Ingefred Torbernsdotter의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1298년 덴마크 니볼그 스텐스트루프에서 Peder Vaedder Absalonsen Ulfeldt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1307년 12월 29일 덴마크 프레더릭스볼그 홀보 스브o더업 스브o더업에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Cecilie Jonsdatter (Litle Galen) nasceu em 1252 filha de Jon Jonsen Litle Galen e Ingefred Torbernsdotter. Ela casou-se com Peder Vaedder Absalonsen Ulfeldt em 1298, em Stenstrup, Nyborg, Dinamarca. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 29 de dezembro de 1307, em Esbønderup, Esbønderup, Holbo, Frederiksborg, Dinamarca, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Cecilie Jonsdatter (Litle Galen) родилась в 1252 г. Её родителей звали Jon Jonsen Litle Galen и Ingefred Torbernsdotter. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Peder Vaedder Absalonsen Ulfeldt в 1298 г. в местности стенструп, ниборг, Дания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 29 декабря 1307 г. в местности эсбoндируп, эсбoндируп, холбо, фредириксборг, Дания в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cecilie Jonsdatter (Litle Galen) nació en 1252 como hija de Jon Jonsen Litle Galen y Ingefred Torbernsdotter. Se casó con Peder Vaedder Absalonsen Ulfeldt en 1298, en Stenstrup, Nyborg, Dinamarca. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 29 de diciembre de 1307, en Esbønderup, Esbønderup, Holbo, Frederiksborg, Dinamarca, a la edad de 55 años.
